headline.es: Comps de dive agresivo dominan. ADCs de on-hit (Xayah, Jhin, Caitlyn) y supports frontline (Nautilus, Braum, Nami) son los picks más confiables. Death's Dance y Trinity Force nerfed = fighters caídos. Taliyah llega May 15.
headline.en: Aggressive dive comps dominate. On-hit ADCs (Xayah, Jhin, Caitlyn) and frontline supports (Nautilus, Braum, Nami) are the most reliable picks. Death's Dance and Trinity Force nerfed = fighters down. Taliyah arrives May 15.

note.es: Zeri, Sivir, Tristana buffed. Vayne, Mel, Riven nerfed. Vladimir +Armor.
note.en: Zeri, Sivir, Tristana buffed. Vayne, Mel, Riven nerfed. Vladimir +Armor.

note.es: Talon, Fizz, Varus, Twitch, Yone buffed. Rammus, Renekton, Swain, Teemo, Amumu nerfed.
note.en: Talon, Fizz, Varus, Twitch, Yone buffed. Rammus, Renekton, Swain, Teemo, Amumu nerfed.

note.es: K'Sante añadido. Nuevo sistema de runas. Boots rework (precio reducido).
note.en: K'Sante added. New rune system. Boots rework (price reduced).

note.es: Ionia Rift. Herald de regreso. Baron HP 9500→12500. Mel, Smolder, Norra añadidos.
note.en: Ionia Rift. Herald returns. Baron HP 9500→12500. Mel, Smolder, Norra added.
